ingredients_text: Petit Pois (30%), Broccoli (30%), Courgette (29%), Fine Beans (6.7%), Mint Butter (4%) (MILK) [Salted Butter (MILK), Lemon Zest, Rapeseed Oil, Cornflour, White Wine Vinegar, Dried Mint, Spinach Powder, Onion Powder, White Pepper, Salt, Garlic Powder, Tarragon]. ALLERGY ADVICE: For allergens, see ingredients in BOLD. May also contain traces of sesame. No artificial colours or flavours.
